div.div:
Figure 7. The state-serving loop for long-horizon agents
A long-running agent is best understood as a closed-loop system that repeatedly compresses, verifies, externalizes, and resumes

div.div: This loop is why long-running agent systems increasingly need both memory architecture and serving architecture, not just larger windows.
